summary: Re-verified ADR 0260 from the latest realistic origin/main baseline by replaying the repo-managed Nextcloud runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, its dedicated PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, and the shared-edge cloud.lv3.org publication from the merged ADR 0251-aware mainline snapshot.

verification.check: Merged-main focused regression and integration suite
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_linux_guest_firewall_role.py tests/test_nextcloud_playbook.py tests/test_nextcloud_runtime_role.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_service_topology_filters.py tests/test_postgres_vm_access_policy.py tests/test_interface_contracts.py tests/test_windmill_playbook.py tests/test_stage_smoke_suites.py tests/test_integration_suite.py tests/test_live_apply_receipts.py tests/test_validation_gate.py` returned `88 passed in 48.14s` after merging the latest realistic origin/main baseline into `codex/ws-0260-main-integration`.

`make converge-nextcloud` completed successfully from the merged snapshot with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=145 changed=3 failed=0 skipped=26`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=38 changed=3 failed=0 skipped=7`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=52 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=14`, and `localhost : ok=18 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=3`; the replay regenerated the shared docs and changelog portals, re-published `cloud.lv3.org`, and re-verified the Nextcloud startup, liveness, and readiness probes.

verification.check: Public Nextcloud status and DAV redirects
verification.observed: `curl -fsS https://cloud.lv3.org/status.php` returned `{"installed":true,"maintenance":false,"versionstring":"33.0.1"...}`, and `curl -fsSI https://cloud.lv3.org/.well-known/caldav` plus `curl -fsSI https://cloud.lv3.org/.well-known/carddav` both returned `HTTP/2 301` with `location: https://cloud.lv3.org/remote.php/dav/`.

Using the same Proxmox jump path as the managed playbook, `ansible docker-runtime-lv3 --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump -m shell -a 'curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8084/status.php'` returned `installed=true`, `maintenance=false`, and `versionstring=33.0.1`; the matching `occ config:app:get core backgroundjobs_mode` query returned `cron`; and `occ user:info ops --output=json` reported `cloud_id=ops@cloud.lv3.org`, `enabled=true`, and `groups=["admin"]`.

`uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/interface_contracts.py --check-live-apply service:nextcloud` passed, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/standby_capacity.py --service nextcloud` returned `Decision: approved`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/service_redundancy.py --check-live-apply --service nextcloud` remained informational at `implemented R0 [gate=unproven]`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/immutable_guest_replacement.py --check-live-apply --service nextcloud --allow-in-place-mutation` accepted the replay with the documented in-place override.

notes: ADR 0260 itself becomes first implemented on main in repo version 0.177.87 after this exact-main replay, with the live platform version advancing from 0.130.58 to 0.130.59 during the protected-file integration step.

The latest-main replay required regenerating `config/uptime-kuma/monitors.json` before the shared portal build would accept the `Nextcloud Public Status` monitor reference, so the canonical monitor output is included in this merge path.

The merged snapshot already contained ADR 0251's stage-smoke-suite integration, so this receipt records the later exact-main Nextcloud replay on top of commit `34559f5910c50f3ffe0cea2cd6701efc08302ffc` rather than the earlier pre-ADR-0251 baseline.
